nasb.text: The sins of some men are quite evident, going before them to judgment; for others, their sins follow after.

esv.text: The sins of some people are conspicuous, going before them to judgment, but the sins of others appear later.

cnv.text: 有些人的罪是明顯的，就先受審判；有些人的罪是後來才顯露出來的。

ccb.text: 有些人的罪很明显，自招审判，有些人的罪日后才暴露出来。

csbs.text: 有些人的罪孽是明显的，要先面对审判；而有些人的罪却是随后跟着的。
